chart.title: Military spending
chart.subtitle: Includes military and civil personnel, operation and maintenance, procurement, military research and development, infrastructure, and aid. This data is expressed in US dollars and adjusted for inflation.
chart.note: This data is expressed in constant 2023 US$.

Military expenditure (constant US$).descriptionShort: This data is expressed in US dollars. It is adjusted for inflation but does not account for differences in the cost of living between countries.
descriptionKey: This data includes military and civil personnel, operation and maintenance, procurement, military research and development, infrastructure, and aid. Civil defense and current expenditures for previous military activities are excluded.
Military expenditure (constant US$).citationShort: Stockholm International Peace Research Institute (2025) – with minor processing by Our World in Data
Military expenditure (constant US$).citationLong: Stockholm International Peace Research Institute (2025) – with minor processing by Our World in Data. “Military expenditure” [dataset]. Stockholm International Peace Research Institute, “SIPRI Military Expenditure Database” [original data].

World region according to OWID.descriptionShort: Regions defined by Our World in Data, which are used in OWID charts and maps.
World region according to OWID.citationShort: Our World in Data – processed by Our World in Data
World region according to OWID.citationLong: Our World in Data – processed by Our World in Data. “World region according to OWID” [dataset]. Our World in Data, “Regions” [original data].
